positive: A majestic, stylized fox spirit sitting serenely amidst luminous, oversized celestial flora and intertwining jungle vines. The composition must be perfectly symmetrical, centralized, and designed as a seamless, high-contrast print. Style: Combining intricate Art Nouveau curves with the graphic punch of a modern woodblock print (Ukiyo-e inspired). Use highly defined black linework, contrasted against a limited, dramatic color palette of iridescent gold, deep midnight indigo, and jewel-toned teal. The scene features dramatic, ethereal backlighting originating from the glowing flowers, emphasizing clean, strong silhouettes. Vector quality, designed for apparel merchandise print, maximal detail.
